news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on July 3, 2025, the approval of H.R. 1, known as the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," is anticipated to bring about detrimental alterations to Medicaid. These changes could limit healthcare availability for pregnant women, infants, children, and low-income households. The bill aims to transfer expenses to states, raising obstacles for individuals seeking medical assistance.
news.headline: H.R. 1, "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," threatens Medicaid access for pregnant women & children by shifting costs.
Energy company granted exploration permit for 914W Uranium Project.

news.summary: LGI Homes, Inc., based in The Woodlands, Texas, shared today that it successfully closed 457 homes in June of 2025. Additionally, the company reported closing a total of 1,323 homes in the second quarter of the same year. LGI Homes, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ with the ticker symbol LGIH.
news.headline: LGI Homes closed 457 homes in June 2025 and 1,323 homes in Q2 2025. Earnings call scheduled.

news.summary: Investors are preparing for potential excitement around the 4th of July as Bitcoin surges above $110,000 before the holiday. Despite some bearish sentiments in the market, traders are anticipating significant movements in the coming days.
news.headline: Bitcoin surges above $110,000, heading towards new all-time high. Traders anticipate 4th of July rally amidst lingering bearish sentiment.
US statement on Rubio call with Syria counterpart
Secretary of State Rubio: US to consider additional actions on ongoing Syria restrictions

news.summary: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, which is an increase of 1.2% from the previous quarter. This means that approximately 2.4 million people are currently unemployed. Additionally, the inflation rate has also seen a significant jump, reaching 4.3% in the last month alone. Experts are concerned about the impact these economic indicators will have on the overall financial stability of the nation. The government has stated that they are implementing measures to address these issues and are optimistic about turning the situation around in the coming months.
news.headline: Abcourt finalizes $8 million loan to begin operations at Sleeping Giant Mine.

news.summary: The recent passage of the One Big Beautiful Bill Act has raised concerns for Susan G. Komen®, the prominent nonprofit breast cancer organization. This legislation includes reforms to federal health insurance programs that are projected by the Congressional Budget Office to lead to approximately 17 million individuals losing their insurance coverage. Consequently, this could elevate the U.S. uninsured rate by 30%. The failure to extend health care tax credits is anticipated to exacerbate these implications.
news.headline: Komen® condemns One Big Beautiful Bill Act, predicts nearly 17 million to lose coverage; uninsured rate may rise by 30%.

news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia on July 3, 2025, Todd Pickard, DMSc, PA-C, DFAAPA, FASCO, President of the American Academy of Physician Associates (AAPA), made an announcement regarding the approval of H.R.1, known as the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act." Pickard expressed his thoughts on the matter in an official statement.
news.headline: AAPA responds to passage of H.R.1, "One Big Beautiful Bill Act" addressing healthcare initiatives. Todd Pickard, AAPA President, issues a statement.

news.summary: The market for GPRC5D-targeted therapies is experiencing significant growth due to the substantial demand in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma. Cutting-edge treatments such as CAR-T cells, bispecific antibodies, and antibody-drug conjugates designed to target GPRC5D are making notable progress in clinical development. This growth is fueled by the urgent requirement for effective therapies, with key market indicators showing a sharp increase in investment and research in this area.
news.headline: GPRC5D therapies market set for growth (2025-2034) due to high unmet need in multiple myeloma, with innovative modalities leading the way.

news.summary: Theratechnologies Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on July 9, 2025. The company, listed on both the TSX (TH) and NASDAQ (THTX), will provide an update on its performance for the quarter ending May 31. This announcement was made on July 3, 2025, and marks an important step in assessing the company's commercial progress and financial health.
news.headline: Theratechnologies to report Q2 2025 financial results on July 9, 2025. TSX: TH, NASDAQ: THTX, ended May 31.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.7%, with the number of individuals without a job totaling 10.1 million. Additionally, the economy experienced a growth rate of 2.3% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The stock market also saw a 4% increase, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute these developments to the implementation of new government policies aimed at boosting economic recovery. Despite these positive trends, concerns remain about the rising inflation rate, which currently stands at 3.5%. The government has pledged to closely monitor the situation and take necessary measures to ensure stability in the market.
news.headline: Westhaven closes private placement with Eric Sprott & Earthlabs for $3.16M. No brokers involved.

news.summary: In Lafayette, Louisiana, on July 3, 2025, Home Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: "HBCP"), the holding company of Home Bank, N.A., announced intentions to release its financial results for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025, after markets close on Monday, July. For more information, visit the Bank's website at www.home24bank.com.
news.headline: Home Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: "HBCP") to issue Q2 2025 earnings report after closing on July 7, 2025.

news.summary: Today, on July 3, 2025, the approved budget reconciliation bill will lead to increased power expenses for consumers in Illinois and nationwide. The tax credits aimed at aiding individuals in utilizing solar energy or practicing energy efficiency within their households are widely favored. This measure is expected to impact a substantial number of people in terms of rising electricity bills while trying to cut down on expenses by adopting alternative energy solutions.
news.headline: Budget reconciliation bill passes, leading to increased power bills for IL consumers; popular tax credits for solar/energy efficiency affected.

news.summary: A major development has taken place as Techy, a renowned company specializing in device repairs, buyback initiatives, and smart device solutions, made public its acquisition of a prominent organization on July 3, 2025. This strategic move brings together two key players in the industry to establish an extensive network offering tech support services. The acquisition is expected to significantly enhance Techy's market presence and capabilities.
news.headline: Techy acquires NerdsToGo to create a comprehensive tech support network, solidifying its global presence.

news.summary: In CENTER VALLEY, Pennsylvania, Shift4 Payments, Inc. (NYSE: FOUR) shared today that they will be issuing dividends for their 6% Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock, totaling 10,000,000 shares, which were initially distributed on May 5, 2025. The company's Board of Directors declared a dividend amounting to $1.45 per share. This dividend is set to be paid out in cash on August 1, 2025, specifically to shareholders of record as of the closing of business on July 15, 2025. The details of the dividend payment are subject to the terms outlined in the Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock agreement.
news.headline: Shift4 Payments declares $1.45 per share dividend on 10,000,000 Series A Preferred Stock, payable on Aug 1, 2025 to shareholders on record by July 15, 2025.

news.summary: A research study is set to evaluate the practical effectiveness of tri-layer and single-layer amnion grafts in healing diabetic foot and venous leg ulcers. The study is conducted by BioLab Holdings, Inc., a medical manufacturer in Phoenix. This study aims to provide valuable insights into the treatment of these ulcers. This research is crucial due to the large number of individuals affected by these conditions. This study will be significant in shaping the future of wound healing and regenerative medicine.
news.headline: BioLab Holdings, Inc. starts multicenter clinical trial testing amnion grafts on chronic wounds. Study to evaluate effectiveness. (Numbers not available)

news.summary: The company has surpassed its Core Adjusted EBITDA guidance, with the latest figures exceeding expectations. Despite this positive development, the company is maintaining its outlook for the fiscal year 2026. This decision comes as the company's AI-Centric Global Capability Center strategy gains momentum, leading to accelerated growth. This indicates a strong performance in the AI sector, promising continued success for the company in the foreseeable future.
news.headline: Aeries Technology exceeds FY 2025 earnings expectations with strong Core Adjusted EBITDA; re-affirms FY 2026 outlook with AI strategy.

news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida on July 3, 2025, Rafferty Domnick Cunningham & Yaffa shared that a number of its lawyers have been recognized on the respected 2025 Florida Super Lawyers list. This list acknowledges outstanding legal professionals in Florida each year and serves as a testament to the expertise of these attorneys.
news.headline: Several attorneys from Rafferty Domnick Cunningham & Yaffa earn spots on 2025 Florida Super Lawyers List.

news.summary: A new study revealed that approximately 25% of adults in the United States have reported feeling anxious most of the time during the past month. The survey, which included over 5,000 participants, found that women were more likely than men to experience ongoing anxiety. Additionally, individuals between the ages of 18 and 34 were the most affected demographic, with 30% reporting persistent anxiety. The results indicate a concerning prevalence of anxiety among adults in the country.
news.headline: Grayscale expresses surprise at SEC's pause on trading ETF holding Solana and XRP.

news.summary: On July 03, 2025, Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. (TSXV: MNC; MNC.PR.A) disclosed that the Alberta Securities Commission issued a cease trade order against them due to non-submission of audited annual financial statements, management discussion and analysis, and related certifications for the year ending December 31, 2024, alongside condensed interim financial statements, management discussion and analysis, and certifications for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company faced unforeseen challenges in finalizing its 2024 annual filings, which were originally due by April 30, 2025.
news.headline: Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. faces Cease Trade Order for not filing financial statements for 2024 and Q1 2025.

news.summary: The Early Care and Education Consortium (ECEC) has commended Congress for the $16 billion allocation towards child care tax incentives in the recently passed One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBA) on July 3, 2025. This legislation received approval from both chambers, signaling a significant step towards improving support for early care and education services.
news.headline: Early Care & Education Consortium praises Congress for $16 billion in child care tax incentives in OBBA Act, July 3, 2025.

news.summary: Vancouver, BC - Diversified Royalty Corp. (TSX: DIV and DIV.DB.A) has raised its annual dividend from 25.0 cents to 27.5 cents per share starting July 1, 2025, as previously declared on June 17, 2025. Following this increase, the board of directors sanctioned a cash dividend of $0.02292 per common share for July 1-31, 2025, totaling $0.275 annually per common share. Shareholders as of closing on July 15, 2025, will receive the dividend on July 31, 2025.
news.headline: Diversified Royalty Corp. increases annual dividend from 25.0 to 27.5 cents per share, paying $0.02292 per share on July 31, 2025.

news.summary: Origin Investment Corp I recently completed its IPO, selling 6,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit, with each unit containing one ordinary share and one-half of a redeemable warrant. The units are now trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol “ORIQU”. Each whole warrant allows the holder to buy one ordinary share at $11.50 per share. The warrants become exercisable 30 days post the company's initial business combination and expire five years post the combination or earlier upon redemption or liquidation. When the units start trading separately, ordinary shares and warrants are expected to trade under “ORIQ” and “ORIQW” respectively on Nasdaq. The underwriters have a 45-day option to buy up to 900,000 more units at the IPO price.
news.headline: Origin Investment Corp I closed a $60,000,000 IPO, offering 6,000,000 units at $10 per unit on Nasdaq under the ticker "ORIQU".
